body.title: Basket fork semantics: shared parent read + emit-back, not copy-on-fork
body.result: Already implemented in session a. node_executor.py documents and implements T-basket-fork-sharing semantics: FORKIF spawns cursors that share parent basket by reference (_shared_basket=_eng_basket in main.py:4393). No copy-on-fork. Test coverage in test_node_executor.py:test_emitif_to_basket_visible_to_subsequent_fork_reads verifies shared basket visibility. Ticket was just not marked done.
body.description: Forks share the parent basket (concurrent read). Child processes emit results back into shared basket. Isolation only when explicitly scoped via new basket + keyed EMIT projection. No copy-on-fork, no serialization at fork boundary. Design the basket access model to match biological shared working memory.
